channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in TypeScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in TypeScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🟦 Gitlawb/openclaude (24577 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Gitlawb

📝 Repository: Gitlawb/openclaude

📄 Descrizione: Open Claude Is Open-source coding-agent CLI for OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Ollama, Codex, GitHub Models, and 200+ models via OpenAI-compatible APIs.

⭐ Stelle: 24577

🍴 Forks: 8052

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-01T03:15:49Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-27T04:51:53Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🟦 claude-code-best/claude-code (16992 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: claude-code-best

📝 Repository: claude-code-best/claude-code

📄 Descrizione: 原汁原昧 Claude Code 可运行,可构建, 可调试版; Typescript 类型全修复; 企业级可靠性; 安全无毒, lock 文件保真, 可直接 bun i; bun run dev 启动

⭐ Stelle: 16992

🍴 Forks: 15460

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T13:33:21Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-27T05:18:52Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🟦 nirholas/claude-code (6367 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nirholas

📝 Repository: nirholas/claude-code

📄 Descrizione: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

⭐ Stelle: 6367

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: claude claude-api claude-code claude-code-plugin claude-code-skill claude-desktop claude-leak claude-skills

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T09:38:18Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-16T00:59:15Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: JackChen-me

📝 Repository: JackChen-me/open-multi-agent

item.title: 🟦 nashsu/llm_wiki (3704 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nashsu

📝 Repository: nashsu/llm_wiki

📄 Descrizione: LLM Wiki is a cross-platform desktop application that turns your documents into an organized, interlinked knowledge base — automatically. Instead of traditional RAG (retrieve-and-answer from scratch every time), the LLM incrementally builds and maintains a persistent wiki from your sources。

🍴 Forks: 445

item.title: 🟦 tanbiralam/claude-code (1484 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tanbiralam

📝 Repository: tanbiralam/claude-code

📄 Descrizione: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands. All original source code is the property of Anthropic.
